title: Why Supply Chain AI Needs Benchmarking & How One Practitioner Is Setting The Standard
description: Supply chain AI is shifting from speed to trust, with benchmarking emerging as a critical priority for accuracy, transparency, and governance. Sandeep Nutakki emphasizes standardized validation, semantic accuracy, and measurable AI systems, helping enterprises build reliable, data-driven decision frameworks for complex supply chain operations.

title: Peppa Pig backlash as US company Hasbro requires child actors to sign voices over to AI
description: US entertainment giant Hasbro is reportedly asking child actors on the popular series Peppa Pig to sign over their voices to artificial intelligence under new contract terms. An open letter signed by 1,000 industry professionals condemns the AI contract clause and warns of matters of consent.

title: Italy to join US-led Pax Silica AI initiative despite Trump row
description: Italy will join the U.S.-led Pax Silica initiative on artificial intelligence supply chains despite a ​row between Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and U.S. ‌President Donald Trump, a foreign ministry official said.
